since_last: 57% of 89 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +4.59%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 57% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.22% · BTC +2.43% · Gold +0.70% · Nasdaq100 -1.54%. 57% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +4.59%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +4.59%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -4.93%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: KLAC is the standout at -11.97%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +10.05%, APP +9.37%, META +9.01%, PLTR +7.29%, MGNI +7.22%. Laggards: KLAC -11.97%, TER -11.53%, MU -11.03%, AMAT -9.86%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -7.67% at $157.75
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -7.67% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
